title: Dann gehste eben nach Parchim - Von der Leidenschaft des jungen Theaters
overview: The first engagement at the small theater in the Mecklenburg province presents Gesa and Arikia with challenges. Schumann accompanies the young women during their first two years, telling of their hopes and doubts, of internal and external resistance.
